authored.para: This instruction compares the halfword values in two registers, and conditionally branches to a label at a PC-relative offset if the condition is true. This instruction provides a hint that this is not a subroutine call or return. This instruction does not affect the condition flags.

alias_list.alias_list_intro: This instruction is used by the aliases

aliasref.hover: Compare signed less than or equal to halfwords and branch
Compare unsigned lower than halfwords and branch
Compare unsigned lower than or same as halfwords and branch
Compare signed less than halfwords and branch

alias_list_outro.text: below for details of when each alias is preferred.

a.hover: Is the 32-bit name of the general-purpose register to be tested, encoded in the "Rt" field.
Is the 32-bit name of the second general-purpose source register, encoded in the "Rm" field.
Is the program label to be conditionally branched to. Its offset from the address of this instruction, in the range -1024 to 1020, is encoded as "imm9" times 4.
Is the 32-bit name of the general-purpose register to be tested, encoded in the "Rt" field.
Is the 32-bit name of the second general-purpose source register, encoded in the "Rm" field.
Is the program label to be conditionally branched to. Its offset from the address of this instruction, in the range -1024 to 1020, is encoded as "imm9" times 4.
Is the 32-bit name of the general-purpose register to be tested, encoded in the "Rt" field.
Is the 32-bit name of the second general-purpose source register, encoded in the "Rm" field.
Is the program label to be conditionally branched to. Its offset from the address of this instruction, in the range -1024 to 1020, is encoded as "imm9" times 4.

Is the 32-bit name of the second general-purpose source register, encoded in the "Rm" field.
Is the program label to be conditionally branched to. Its offset from the address of this instruction, in the range -1024 to 1020, is encoded as "imm9" times 4.
Is the 32-bit name of the general-purpose register to be tested, encoded in the "Rt" field.
Is the 32-bit name of the second general-purpose source register, encoded in the "Rm" field.
Is the program label to be conditionally branched to. Its offset from the address of this instruction, in the range -1024 to 1020, is encoded as "imm9" times 4.

ps.name: A64.control.compbranch_regs2.CBHGT_16_regs

explanation.enclist: CBHGT_16_regs, CBHGE_16_regs, CBHHI_16_regs, CBHHS_16_regs, CBHEQ_16_regs, CBHNE_16_regs

intro.para: Is the 32-bit name of the general-purpose register to be tested, encoded in the "Rt" field.

ps.name: A64.control.compbranch_regs2.CBHGT_16_regs
